name: Donna Celeiro's "Catskill Mountain Rye
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the water, vegetable oil, honey, salt, and caraway seeds to a large bowl.
2. Mix in the rye flour, bread flour, nonfat dry milk, yeast, and gluten until well combined.
3. Place the dough in a bread machine on "standard" or "white bread" mode.
I hope you like this recipe. It retains all the great flavor but rises quite high and has a real nice texture.
